Blog byline: stacked First published / Last updated on rewritten posts

Shared BlogPostRenderer change: when dateModified differs from the original
date, show "First published <date>" + "Last updated <date>" stacked at the
byline. Never-rewritten pages keep the single-date byline. Schema already
emitted both datePublished + dateModified; visible dates now match.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
